name: Zyaire & Jaydan GabbaLand
overview: Zyaire and Jaydan GabbaLand is a fun live-Animation program for young children. Join our host Zyaire Jaydan And Our New Host Jaliyah as They introduces us to friendly toy monsters in a magical land full of music, dance, and color.
